description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and publish that triggers on push with tags matching v*. The workflow should have three jobs: sdist on ubuntu-latest, macos-wheels on macos-latest with a Python version matrix, and linux-wheels on ubuntu-latest in a manylinux container with a Python version matrix. Each job should check out the repository, set up Python, cache pip, install dependencies, and then build and publish distributions to PyPI using twine with a TWINE_TOKEN from secrets.
